_doc: CSE people roster for photo→event disambiguation. When a date is covered by >1 event, the engine matches names in the photo's Comments/User against each event's attendees (tracker Industry Events cols E 'Team Member Leading' + F 'Other Attendees'), normalized via these aliases. Fill the TODOs. aliases are lowercased; include first name, full name, and Discord handle.

people.note: COMMON POSTER. Bare 'Phil' defaults to Phil Shum unless 'Phil C'/'Cox' is specified.

external_organizers.name: Raj
external_organizers.event_hint: TODO — which event(s) does Raj organize? (would let us match the June 3 'With Raj' photo)
